reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Gate 1: execute_transaction_without_commit is part of pub trait BlockExecutor (public API, exempt from dead code check). Gate 2: Entry point is untrusted (P2P/transaction submission). Gate 3: Blob gas validation is in-scope for Fusaka audit. An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by submitting multiple blob transactions whose cumulative blob gas exceeds MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK, causing the block executor to produce invalid blocks that will be rejected by other nodes.
